yves-hector-vimegnon-v-gallagher-bassett.lesson: Pro-se fabricated citations trigger warnings now; expect sanctions on the next filing.

edward-reynolds-v-progressive-technologi.lesson: Courts are now actively locating pro-se fake cites; warnings become monetary on repeat.

nicole-olbera-et-al-v-tiara-sykes-2026-0.lesson: Appellate editors now scrub invalid AI citations from published opinions — reputational trail persists.

shaun-fleck-v-del-one-federal-credit-uni.lesson: Westlaw self-citation loops are a tell: if only the filer's own brief shows, the cite is fabricated.

beedemariam-kassaw-v-wal-mart-corporatio.lesson: Courts will strike entire briefs sua sponte when AI hallucinations are apparent — no motion required.

randel-edward-page-jr-v-apperson-crump-2.lesson: Three fabricated cites in one motion is now the norm — courts catch them on independent research.

76-route-6-holdings-inc-v-town-of-yorkto.lesson: False-quote admonishments go on the record — verify every quoted passage against the source opinion.

jacobs-v-payward-inc-2026-03-30.lesson: A single hallucinated cite now 'undermines credibility' of the entire filing — judges read everything skeptically.

danuta-dec-v-homeland-security-2026-03-3.lesson: Counsel who 'cannot explain' a fabricated cite when questioned escalate admonishment into discipline risk.

megan-e-bryan-v-child-support-enforcemen.lesson: Reporter-number mismatches are the single fastest tell of an AI hallucination — check the volume, not just the name.

lauren-k-morgan-v-michael-p-whitticom-20.lesson: State courts are invoking practice-book sanction rules for AI fabrications — pro-se is no longer a shield on the second filing.

amtrust-north-america-obo-justin-mcginne.lesson: Four fabricated NJ cites drew $9K plus recommended CLE — subrogation briefs now warrant supervisor sign-off.

patrick-c-shaltry-i-v-brent-benzing-et-a.lesson: Quoted passages contradicting the cited case's holding are red flags — read the opinion, not just the pincite.

andrea-k-tantaros-v-fox-news-network-llc.lesson: AI will fabricate statutory language as readily as case law — verify every quoted statute against the code.

pizzimenti-v-city-of-detroit-et-al-2026-.lesson: Misapplied real cases are as damaging as fake ones — confirm the cited opinion actually addresses your proposition.

mccarthy-v-us-drug-enforcement-administr.lesson: Third Circuit now notifies the National Disciplinary Data Bank on AI fabrications — one reprimand follows you circuit-wide.

the-advocates-for-human-rights-and-lhm-v.lesson: A brief 'riddled with misquotations' is enough for the court to flag AI use — quote discipline is the new diligence.

curry-v-capital-one-auto-finance-2026-03.lesson: Fabricated statutory provisions now constitute bad faith and support denial of leave to amend — not just admonishment.

baker-v-rastelli-foods-llc-2026-03-26.lesson: Courts now order PDF copies of cited cases as a gating step — if you can't produce them, you're on an OSC.

anthony-wallace-v-pennymac-loan-services.lesson: Docket-number mismatches with case names are a deterministic hallucination signature — always cross-check PACER.
